languages.text: {n}Полковник Батошски скалится, словно разозленный зверь.{/n} "{name}, Зарков бы не стал просить помощи без весомого повода. Мы выживали там веками".
{n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник Батошски скалится, словно разозленный зверь.{/n} "{name}, Зарков бы не стал просить помощи без весомого повода. Мы выживали там веками".

languages.text: {n}バトシフスキー大佐は怒った動物のように唸る。{/n} 「{name}, ザルコフは正当な理由がないと助けを求めない。我々は自力で何世紀も生き延びてきたのだ」
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."

languages.text: {n}Albay Batoshski, öfkeli bir hayvan gibi hırlıyor.{/n} "Geçerli bir sebep olmasa Zarkov yardım istemezdi. Orada yüzyıllardır kendi başımıza hayatta kaldık."
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay Batoshski, öfkeli bir hayvan gibi hırlıyor.{/n} "Geçerli bir sebep olmasa Zarkov yardım istemezdi. Orada yüzyıllardır kendi başımıza hayatta kaldık."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基上校发出野兽般的低吼。{/n}“{name}，扎尔科夫绝不会无故求援。我们在那里独自生存了数百年。”
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基上校发出野兽般的低吼。{/n}“{name}，扎尔科夫绝不会无故求援。我们在那里独自生存了数百年。”

languages.text: {n}Colonel Batoshski knurrt wie ein wütendes Tier.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov würde nicht ohne guten Grund um Hilfe bitten. Wir haben da draußen seit Jahrhunderten ohne Euch überlebt."
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."

traits.locale_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski knurrt wie ein wütendes Tier.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov würde nicht ohne guten Grund um Hilfe bitten. Wir haben da draußen seit Jahrhunderten ohne Euch überlebt."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel Batoshski grogne comme un animal enragé.{/n} « {name}, Zarkov ne vous solliciterait pas s'il ne s'agissait pas d'un cas de force majeure. Pour rappel, nous avons survécu sur cette planète des siècles durant sans l'aide de personne. »
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel Batoshski grogne comme un animal enragé.{/n} « {name}, Zarkov ne vous solliciterait pas s'il ne s'agissait pas d'un cas de force majeure. Pour rappel, nous avons survécu sur cette planète des siècles durant sans l'aide de personne. »

languages.text: {n}El coronel Batoshski gruñe como un animal furioso.{/n} «{name}, Zarkov no pediría ayuda si no fuera necesaria. Hemos sobrevivido durante siglos por nuestra cuenta».
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel Batoshski gruñe como un animal furioso.{/n} «{name}, Zarkov no pediría ayuda si no fuera necesaria. Hemos sobrevivido durante siglos por nuestra cuenta».
